description: Codex review output — used for both spec-gate reviews (docs) and adversarial code review. quote applies to document gates; file/line_start/line_end apply to code review. OpenAI structured outputs requires EVERY property to be listed in `required`, so fields that do not apply to a given mode are nullable rather than optional — send null, not an omitted key. Do not add minLength/minimum/maximum here; they are rejected.

summary.description: Terse ship/no-ship assessment. Lead with the claim; no preamble, no recap.

id.description: Short stable handle, e.g. X1, X2. The challenge round addresses findings by id.

confidence.description: 0 to 1. Keep it honest — you will be asked to defend this finding.

quote.description: Document gates: verbatim text from the artifact this finding is about. null when the finding is about content that is ABSENT, or in code-review mode.

file.description: Code review: repo-relative path. null in document-gate mode.
